posts.title: I submitted my assignment 2 minutes before deadline
posts.body: Heart rate was 180. Hands shaking. WiFi almost died. But we made it. Professors hate this one simple trick.

posts.title: I asked ChatGPT to write my essay and got caught
posts.body: Turns out 'as an AI language model' is not something I would write. 0/10 recommend. Now I have a meeting with the dean.

posts.title: Who decided 8am classes should exist?
posts.body: I want to have a conversation with that person. Outside. Right now. My 8am attendance is 20% and dropping. This is not a flex, it's a cry for help.

posts.title: I survived a whole week on €10
posts.body: Noodles, free coffee from the library, and stealing my roommate's snacks. The grind is real. Someone please buy me a meal. I will do your homework.

posts.title: I finally went to the gym after saying I would for 6 months
posts.body: Can't move my arms. Can't feel my legs. Wrote this with my nose. Worth it though. Maybe. Ask me again tomorrow.

posts.title: My group project partner just texted 'can u do my part?'
posts.body: Bro. The presentation is in 2 hours. You had 3 weeks. I'm putting your name on the slide but not saying a word. The professor will know.

posts.title: PSA: Please stop putting pizza in the CD drive
posts.body: That is not a cup holder. That is not a pizza warmer. I don't know why this needs to be said but here we are. Three laptops this week alone.

posts.title: Someone just microwaved fish in the library
posts.body: There are no words. We need to talk about basic human decency. The entire third floor smells like a seafood market. I'm writing this from the bathroom hiding.

posts.title: Been circling the parking lot for 45 minutes
posts.body: I've seen three fights, two breakups, and a guy crying. There are no spots. I'm considering just driving into the sun. Tuition pays for what exactly?

posts.title: What IS this on my plate?
posts.body: It's brown. It's wet. It's moving slightly. I asked the lunch lady what it was. She just smiled. I'm scared. Someone adopt me off campus.

posts.title: My group members haven't responded in 2 weeks
posts.body: Presentation is tomorrow. I've done 100% of the work. Their names are on the slides but I'm about to photoshop them out. Watch me.

posts.title: The campus coffee machine is broken again
posts.body: This is not a drill. People are panicking. Someone just offered me $20 for my cold leftover coffee. I said no. Pray for us.

posts.title: My roommate's alarm has been ringing for 2 hours
posts.body: He's not here. He left for class. In the end I broke his phone in half and peace has finally been granted to me. Don't know what he's gonna do about the phone though.

posts.title: Someone took my clothes out mid cycle
posts.body: They were wet. Just threw them on the floor like an animal. I'm sitting here watching my underwear on the dirty floor. Who raised you?

posts.title: The campus printer hates me personally
posts.body: I've tried everything. Restarted it. Swore at it. Cried in front of it. It prints everyone else's stuff but mine. I think it's sentient and evil.

posts.title: Haven't slept in 48 hours AMA
posts.body: Ask me anything. I'm hallucinating. I think the chair just waved at me. My notes say 'potato' written 47 times. I don't know why.

posts.title: Moodle just went down 1 hour before deadline
posts.body: This is not a drill. 300 people in the group chat are panicking. Someone is crying on Google Meet. The professors better accept email submissions or there will be riots.

posts.title: My train is delayed by 90 minutes
posts.body: The professor said 'if you're late don't bother coming.' It's not my fault. I've been on this platform since 5am. I'm becoming one with the bench.

posts.title: Just changed my major for the 4th time
posts.body: Started in Engineering. Then Business. Then Psychology. Now Art History? I'm a junior. My advisor has given up on me. My parents don't know yet.

posts.title: Da
posts.body: sdfgsgsdgsdfgsf

posts.title: Test
posts.body: Hope it works :D

posts.title: Post by me
posts.body: Testing 😁
